Uses of Package
javax.xml.namespace

  • Packages that use javax.xml.namespace 
    Package Description
    javax.microedition.xml.rpc
    Provides the API that defines JSR 172 JAX-RPC subset of WSDL types.
    javax.xml.namespace
    XML Namespace processing.
  • Classes in javax.xml.namespace used by javax.microedition.xml.rpc 
    Class and Description
    QName
    QName represents a qualified name as defined in the XML specifications: XML Schema Part2: Datatypes specification, Namespaces in XML, Namespaces in XML Errata.
  • Classes in javax.xml.namespace used by javax.xml.namespace 
    Class and Description
    QName
    QName represents a qualified name as defined in the XML specifications: XML Schema Part2: Datatypes specification, Namespaces in XML, Namespaces in XML Errata.
